name: cairn
description: Boundary-discipline harness so the marginal cost of each feature slopes down. Composable skills built around a six-stage plan -> skeleton -> build -> verify -> record -> ratchet loop with a human spec parse-point, the four boundary kinds (trust, effect, consistency, containment), library-knowledge as an ecosystem trust boundary, and a knowledge-ratchet that promotes recurring friction leftward toward unrepresentable-illegal.
